about.description: We specialize in high-performance concrete coating systems designed to transform and protect residential, commercial, and industrial surfaces. Based in Bunnell, Florida, our certified technicians install premium polyaspartic and epoxy flooring systems engineered for durability, beauty, and long-term performance. Excellence in execution, pride in every surface.

description: Titan Coatings was founded by Phil Conway, a certified pressure washing professional who saw a natural connection between cleaning surfaces and protecting them. Through his experience running Elite Powerwashing, Phil learned that a truly great coating starts with a truly clean surface—and that's where Titan Coatings was born.

What began as an extension of his pressure washing services quickly grew into a standalone business focused entirely on premium polyaspartic and epoxy floor coatings. Today, Titan Coatings serves homeowners, businesses, HOAs, and municipalities across Northeast Florida with coating systems that deliver durability, beauty, and long-term value.

Phil's background in pressure washing gives Titan Coatings a unique advantage: meticulous surface preparation, an eye for detail, and a commitment to doing the job right the first time. Strong floors. Stronger futures.

image.alt: Phil Conway - Owner & Founder, Titan Coatings

description: Titan Coatings offers residential, commercial, and industrial polyaspartic and epoxy floor coating systems. From garages and patios to warehouses and restaurants, we deliver durable, beautiful results.
We also specialize in decorative flake systems, metallic floors, and concrete surface restoration—all installed by master certified technicians.

section.headline: Frequently Asked Questions
section.description: Expert answers to common questions about polyaspartic and epoxy concrete coatings.

items.question: What is polyaspartic coating?
items.answer: Polyaspartic is a high-performance concrete coating that is stronger than epoxy, cures in hours, resists UV damage, and lasts longer than traditional coatings. It's our most recommended system for garages, patios, and commercial floors.

items.question: What's the difference between polyaspartic and epoxy?
items.answer: Polyaspartic cures much faster (1 day vs 3-7 days), is more UV resistant (won't yellow in sunlight), and is generally stronger. Epoxy is still durable but better for indoor, low-UV environments.

items.question: What does the lifetime warranty cover?
items.answer: Our lifetime warranty covers coating failure such as peeling, blistering, or delamination on qualifying installations. Terms and eligibility are detailed in your contract.

items.question: How long does installation take?
items.answer: Most garage floors are completed in 1-2 days. Polyaspartic coatings cure in hours, so you can walk on the surface the same day and park vehicles within 24 hours.

items.question: Do you work with HOAs and commercial clients?
items.answer: Yes. We're trusted by HOAs like Palm Coast Plantation and commercial clients including Chick-fil-A and Dutch Bros. We handle everything from pool decks to restaurant floors to municipal facilities.

items.question: Are your technicians certified?
items.answer: Yes. Titan Coatings employs Master Certified Technicians who complete rigorous training on proper surface preparation, application techniques, and safety standards.

items.question: Can you coat outdoor surfaces?
items.answer: Absolutely. We offer UV-resistant polyaspartic coatings specifically designed for patios, pool decks, driveways, and walkways that withstand Florida sun and weather.

items.question: What are decorative flake systems?
items.answer: Flake systems are coating finishes where colored vinyl chips are broadcast into the wet coating, creating a slip-resistant, decorative surface available in many color combinations.

items.question: Do you offer free estimates?
items.answer: Yes! Contact us by phone at (386) 597-3016 or through our website to schedule your free, no-obligation estimate.

items.question: Is the warranty transferable if I sell my home?
items.answer: Some of our warranties are transferable to new homeowners, which can add value when selling your property. Ask your estimator for specific terms.

Through years of running Elite Powerwashing, Phil mastered the art of surface preparation—and realized he could offer even more value by protecting the surfaces he cleaned with premium coating systems.
